name: Jerome Ramel
background: Jerome Ramel is President, Power and Discrete Products Group, a position he has held since 2022. He is a member of ST’s Executive Committee. Ramel joined ST in 1995 and has held various management positions in the Power and Discrete Group.

company_affiliations.name: STMicroelectronics N.V.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations
